title: 'They are stealing the election': How Armenia became the next Russia-EU battlefield
description: Armenians are set to head to the polls in June for their parliamentary elections, which the EU and Russia are closely watching. With support for joining the bloc at an all-time high, this could be a sign that the former Soviet country is moving away from Moscow, one of its closest allies. But foreign interference from both sides could result in the election being stolen from the Armenian people, according to some observers.

title: What is UNIFIL? the UN mission in southern Lebanon explained
description: The United Nations Interim Force in Lebanon (UNIFIL) has patrolled southern Lebanon along the border with Israel since 1978, acting as a buffer force following Israel’s invasion of the region. Expanded after the 2006 war between Israel and Hezbollah, the mission now monitors the ceasefire and supports the Lebanese army, with more than 7,500 peacekeepers deployed—though it has no mandate to intervene militarily.

title: Spain’s Sánchez leads progressive push as far-right gathers in Milan
description: On Saturday, Pedro Sánchez hosted left-wing leaders at rallies promoting democracy and progressive unity on Barcelona. title: Iran War Forces America’s Friends in Asia to Court Its Rivals
description: The severe disruption of oil supplies from the Middle East as a result of the war has prompted South Korea and the Philippines to make deals with Russia and Iran.

title: In Angola, Pope Leo XIV Faces the Legacy of Slavery
description: His visit includes a trip to a shrine where enslaved Africans were baptized before being forced into the treacherous voyage across the Atlantic Ocean.

title: A Potent Threat in Strait of Hormuz: Iran’s “Mosquito Fleet”
description: Separate from the regular Iranian Navy, with boats that often go more than 115 miles per hour, it’s what a retired U.S. official calls a “disruptive force.”

title: ВМС США опровергли информацию о плохом питании моряков в зоне блокады Ирана
description: Штаб военно-морских сил США выступил с опровержением информации о нехватке продуктов питания и скудных пайках моряков авианосца USS Abraham Lincoln и большого десантного корабля USS Tripoli, участвующих в блокаде иранских судов."Недавние сообщения о нехватке и низком качестве продовольствия на борту наших развернутых кораблей являются ложными", - заявил штаб ВМС."Военно-морские силы США обладают непревзойденными логистическими возможностями для п

title: Polish town’s new ‘information center’ denies murders of Jews by local Poles in 1941
description:
Family of Jewish man who survived the Jedwabne massacre, Szmul Wasersztein, is trying to get the new installation removed: 'We call it a denial museum, because that’s what it is'
The post Polish towns new ‘information center’ denies murders of Jews by local Poles in 1941 appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: French court rules antisemitism not a motive in nanny’s poisoning of Jewish family
description:
Despite telling police 'they have money and power, I should never have worked for a Jewish woman,' appeals court denies Algerian caretaker was driven by Jew hatred 
The post French court rules antisemitism not a motive in nannys poisoning of Jewish family appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Amid truce with Israel, Aoun says Lebanon to now seek ‘permanent agreements’
description:
Declaring his country 'stands before a new phase,' Lebanese president says it's 'not a sign of weakness' to negotiate with Israel, which he only directly mentions while urging IDF withdrawal
The post Amid truce with Israel, Aoun says Lebanon to now seek permanent agreements appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Iran’s top negotiator threatens to close Strait of Hormuz if US blockade continues
description:
USS Gerald Ford returns to Mideast as 3rd American aircraft carrier heads to region * Despite Iranian denials, Trump insists Islamic Republic's uranium to be taken ‘back home to the USA very soon’
The post Iran’s top negotiator threatens to close Strait of Hormuz if US blockade continues appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Trump claims ‘no sticking points at all,’ predicts deal with Iran could come in days
description:
President says US will remove Iran's enriched uranium 'at leisurely pace,' but Iran denies it; also claims Iran will stop backing Hamas, Hezbollah; US and Iranian officials say significant gaps remain
The post Trump claims no sticking points at all, predicts deal with Iran could come in days appeared first on The Times of Israel.
